questions.question: In this school, all ___ students are given free education.
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: We use the definite article 'the' to refer to a specific group of students (the students of 'this school').

questions.question: I have a friend in Mumbai who is ___ actress.
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: The word 'actress' begins with a vowel sound, so the indefinite article 'an' is appropriate.

questions.question: Which of the following is not a river?
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: The Bay of Bengal is a sea/bay, whereas Godavari and Ganga are rivers.

questions.question: Which of the following is not a part of drawing room?
options: More than one of the above
questions.answer: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: Both the washing machine and the chimney are typically found in the laundry area and kitchen, respectively, not the drawing room.

questions.question: Today is Sunday. The day before yesterday was
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: If today is Sunday, yesterday was Saturday, and the day before yesterday was Friday.

questions.question: November comes after the month of
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: November comes after October, which is not listed in the options.

questions.question: Husband's brother is
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: A husband's brother is legally and socially referred to as a brother-in-law.

questions.question: Mother's parents are
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: Parents of one's mother are called maternal grandparents.

questions.question: निम्नलिखित में से कौन-सा 'प्रत्यय-रहित' शब्द है?
options: उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
questions.explanation: 'भावविह्वल' शब्द समास से बना है (भाव से विह्वल), इसमें कोई प्रत्यय नहीं है। 'झुकाव' में 'आव' और 'उल्लेखनीय' में 'ईय' प्रत्यय है।

questions.question: भाषा की उपयुक्त परिभाषा है
options: विचार या भाव प्रकट करने वाला सार्थक ध्वनिसमूह भाषा कहलाता है
विचार या भाव को लिपि-चिह्नों में प्रकट करने को भाषा कहते हैं
विचार या भाव प्रकट करने का साधन भाषा है
उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
questions.answer: विचार या भाव प्रकट करने का साधन भाषा है
questions.explanation: भाषा वह साधन है जिसके द्वारा मनुष्य अपने विचारों और भावों का आदान-प्रदान करता है।

questions.question: स्वर के कितने प्रकार हैं?
options: उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
questions.explanation: मुख्य रूप से स्वर के दो प्रकार माने जाते हैं: ह्रस्व स्वर और दीर्घ स्वर (प्लुत स्वर का प्रयोग अब नगण्य है)।

questions.question: हस्व स्वर कौन-सा है?
options: उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
questions.explanation: 'अ' एक ह्रस्व स्वर है, जबकि 'आ' और 'ई' दीर्घ स्वर हैं।

questions.question: उच्चारण के आधार पर व्यंजनों का वर्गीकरण कितने भागों में किया जा सकता है?
options: उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
questions.explanation: उच्चारण स्थान के आधार पर व्यंजनों को मुख्यतः आठ वर्गों में बांटा जाता है (कण्ठ्य, तालव्य, मूर्धन्य, दन्त्य, ओष्ठ्य, वर्त्स्य, दन्तोष्ठ्य, काकल्य)।

questions.question: 'अल्पप्राण' ध्वनि कौन-सी है?
options: उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
questions.explanation: वर्ग का पहला, तीसरा और पाँचवाँ व्यंजन अल्पप्राण होता है। 'च' वर्ग का पहला व्यंजन है।

questions.question: 'घोष' ध्वनि कौन-सी है?
options: उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
questions.answer: उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
questions.explanation: वर्ग का तीसरा, चौथा और पाँचवाँ व्यंजन घोष (सघोष) होता है। ग, ज, और ध तीनों घोष ध्वनियाँ हैं।

questions.question: स्पर्शी व्यंजन है
options: उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
questions.explanation: क से म तक के व्यंजन स्पर्शी कहलाते हैं। यहाँ 'प' स्पर्शी व्यंजन का सटीक उदाहरण है।

questions.question: 'अग्नि' शब्द का विशेषण है
options: उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
questions.explanation: 'अग्नि' शब्द से बना विशेषण 'आग्नेय' होता है।

questions.question: प्रकंपी व्यंजन है
options: उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
questions.explanation: 'र' का उच्चारण करते समय जीभ में प्रकम्पन (कंपन) होता है, इसलिए इसे प्रकंपी या लुंठित व्यंजन कहते हैं।

questions.question: अर्ध स्वर है
options: उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
questions.answer: उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
questions.explanation: हिंदी वर्णमाला में 'य' और 'व' दोनों को अर्ध स्वर माना जाता है।

questions.question: चवर्ग का व्यंजन है
options: उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
questions.answer: उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
questions.explanation: छ, ज, झ सभी 'च' वर्ग (तालव्य) के अंतर्गत आते हैं।

questions.question: (क) केकी, (ख) विहंग, (ग) खग, (घ) पिक विकल्पों में से कौन-सा युग्म 'पक्षी' के पर्याय का है?
options: उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
questions.explanation: 'विहंग' और 'खग' दोनों पक्षी के पर्यायवाची हैं। 'केकी' मोर का और 'पिक' कोयल का पर्याय है।

questions.question: विलोम शब्द का कौन-सा युग्म सही है?
options: उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
questions.explanation: दिए गए सभी युग्म गलत हैं। कापुरुष-कायर और कुत्सा-निंदा समानार्थी हैं।

questions.question: निम्नलिखित में से कौन-सा वाक्य अशुद्ध है?
options: उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
questions.explanation: दिए गए सभी वाक्य व्याकरणिक दृष्टि से शुद्ध हैं।

questions.question: रचना के आधार पर कौन-सा विकल्प वाक्य का भेद नहीं है?
options: उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
questions.explanation: रचना के आधार पर वाक्य के तीन भेद होते हैं: सरल, संयुक्त और मिश्र। 'उपवाक्य' वाक्य का भेद नहीं है।

questions.question: जिन शब्दों से न्यूनता, लघुता, हीनता या तुच्छता का बोध हो, उसे क्या कहते हैं?
options: उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
questions.explanation: लघुता या हीनता का बोध कराने वाले शब्दों को ऊनार्थक (Unarthak) शब्द कहा जाता है।

questions.question: 'जिसे बुलाया न गया हो' वाक्यांश के लिए प्रयुक्त एक शब्द क्या होगा?
options: उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
questions.explanation: 'जिसे बुलाया न गया हो' उसे अनाहूत कहते हैं।

questions.question: संज्ञा की माप-तौल का बोध कराने वाले विशेषण कहलाते हैं
options: उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
questions.explanation: माप-तौल या मात्रा का बोध कराने वाले विशेषण परिमाणवाचक विशेषण कहलाते हैं।

questions.question: रचना के आधार पर 'जल' शब्द किस कोटि का है?
options: उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
questions.explanation: 'जल' शब्द के खंड करने पर कोई सार्थक अर्थ नहीं निकलता (ज + ल), अतः यह रूढ़ शब्द है।

questions.question: निम्नलिखित में से कौन-सा मात्रिक छन्द है?
options: उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
questions.answer: उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
questions.explanation: दोहा और सोरठा दोनों मात्रिक छन्द हैं। इंद्रवज्रा वर्णिक छन्द है।

questions.question: "उदित उदयगिरि मंच पर रघुवर बाल पतंग। बिकसे संत सरोज सब हरषे लोचन भृंग।।" उपर्युक्त दोहे में कौन-सा अलंकार है?
options: उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
questions.explanation: यहाँ मंच पर उदयाचल का, राम पर सूर्य का, संतों पर सरोज का और नेत्रों पर भृंग का अभेद आरोप है, इसलिए रूपक अलंकार है।

questions.question: The price of 5 bats and 18 balls is ₹6,500 and the price of 2 bats and 20 balls is ₹4,200. The prices of one bat and one ball are respectively / 5 बल्लों और 18 गेंदों की कीमत ₹6,500 है तथा 2 बल्लों और 20 गेंदों की कीमत ₹4,200 है। एक बल्ला और एक गेंद की कीमतें हैं, क्रमशः
options: More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं

questions.question: A shopkeeper buys an article for ₹615 and sells it for ₹820. What is his profit percentage? / एक दुकानदार किसी वस्तु को ₹615 में खरीदता है और उसे ₹820 में बेच देता है। उसका प्रतिशत मुनाफ़ा कितना है?
options: More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं

questions.question: A hacker discovers that the first two digits of a person's ATM PIN are from the numbers 3 to 8, and the fourth digit is 0 or 9. How many attempts will the hacker have to make to find the PIN? / एक हैकर पता लगाता है कि एक व्यक्ति के ATM PIN के पहले दो अंक 3 से 8 तक की संख्याओं में से हैं, और चौथा अंक 0 या 9 है। उस हैकर को PIN का पता करने के लिए कितने प्रयास करने पड़ेंगे?
options: More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: First digit options = 6 (3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8). Second digit options = 6. Third digit options = 10 (0-9). Fourth digit options = 2 (0, 9). Total combinations = 6 × 6 × 10 × 2 = 720.

questions.question: The lengths of two sides of a triangle are 8 cm and 9 cm and its area is $12\sqrt{5}$ sq cm. What is the length of its third side? / एक त्रिभुज की दो भुजाओं की लंबाइयाँ 8 से० मी० और 9 से० मी० हैं तथा इसका क्षेत्रफल $12\sqrt{5}$ वर्ग से० मी० है। इसकी तीसरी भुजा की लंबाई क्या है?
options: More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: Using Heron's formula. Area = $\sqrt{s(s-a)(s-b)(s-c)}$. If sides are 8, 9, 7. s = 24/2 = 12. Area = $\sqrt{12 \times 4 \times 3 \times 5} = \sqrt{720} = 12\sqrt{5}$. Hence, third side is 7 cm.

questions.question: 50 numbers are given. Each number is subtracted from 53 and the mean of the numbers so obtained is -3.5. The mean of the given numbers is / 50 संख्याएँ दी हुई हैं। प्रत्येक संख्या को 53 से घटाया गया है और इस तरह प्राप्त संख्याओं का माध्य -3.5 है। दी गई संख्याओं का माध्य है
options: More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: Let original mean be M. The new mean is the mean of (53 - xi) which is 53 - M. So, 53 - M = -3.5 => M = 53 + 3.5 = 56.5.

questions.question: The ratio of the ages of two brothers is 4:3. If the elder brother is 6 years older than the younger brother, then the ages of the two brothers (in years) are / दो भाइयों की उम्रों का अनुपात 4:3 है। यदि बड़ा भाई, छोटे भाई से 6 वर्ष बड़ा है, तो दोनों भाइयों की उम्र (वर्ष में) हैं
options: More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: Let ages be 4x and 3x. Difference is x = 6. So ages are 4×6=24 and 3×6=18.

questions.question: The value of $(1-\frac{1}{2})(1-\frac{1}{3})(1-\frac{1}{4})\cdot\cdot\cdot(1-\frac{1}{n})$ is / $(1-\frac{1}{2})(1-\frac{1}{3})(1-\frac{1}{4})\cdot\cdot\cdot(1-\frac{1}{n})$ का मान है
options: More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: Series expands to (1/2) × (2/3) × (3/4) × ... × ((n-1)/n). Numerators and denominators cancel out, leaving 1/n.

questions.question: The quadratic equation with roots -1 and 4 is / मूलों -1 और 4 वाला द्विघात समीकरण है
options: More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: Equation with roots $\alpha$ and $\beta$ is $(x-\alpha)(x-\beta) = 0$. So $(x - (-1))(x - 4) = (x+1)(x-4) = x^2 - 3x - 4 = 0$.

questions.question: The solar observation point of the Aditya-L1 satellite is / आदित्य-L1 उपग्रह का सूर्य अवलोकन बिन्दु है
options: More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: The Aditya-L1 spacecraft is placed in a halo orbit around the Lagrange point 1 (L1) of the Sun-Earth system.

questions.question: Ginger is an underground stem and not a root because / अदरक एक भूमिगत तना है एवं जड़ नहीं है, क्योंकि
options: It stores food material / यह खाद्य सामग्री का भण्डारण करता है
It has nodes and internodes / इसमें गाँठ एवं पर्व होते हैं
It lacks chlorophyll / इसमें क्लोरोफिल की कमी होती है
More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.answer: It has nodes and internodes / इसमें गाँठ एवं पर्व होते हैं
questions.explanation: The defining characteristic of a stem, unlike a root, is the presence of nodes and internodes.

questions.question: A convex lens has a focal length $f_L = 10$ cm. When immersed in water, it will act like / एक उत्तल लेंस की फोकस दूरी $f_L = 10$ से० मी० है। पानी में इसे डुबोने पर यह कार्य करेगा
options: a convex lens of $f_L = 10$ cm / $f_L = 10$ से० मी० के एक उत्तल लेंस की तरह
a concave lens of $f_L = 10$ cm / $f_L = 10$ से० मी० के एक अवतल लेंस की तरह
a convex lens of $f_L > 10$ cm / $f_L > 10$ से० मी० के एक उत्तल लेंस की तरह
More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.answer: a convex lens of $f_L > 10$ cm / $f_L > 10$ से० मी० के एक उत्तल लेंस की तरह
questions.explanation: When immersed in water, the relative refractive index of the lens decreases, which increases its focal length. It remains a convex lens.

questions.question: Although water is transparent to visible light, distant objects cannot be seen in a fog made of fine drops of water. This happens because / हालाँकि दृश्य प्रकाश में जल पारदर्शक होता है, दूरस्थ वस्तुओं को जल की महीन बूँदों से निर्मित कोहरे में नहीं देखा जा सकता। यह इसलिए होता है, क्योंकि
options: Fine drops of water are opaque to visible light / दृश्य प्रकाश में जल की महीन बूँदें अपारदर्शी होती हैं
Most of the light is scattered, creating visual blur / अधिकतर प्रकाश बिखरकर आभासी अस्पष्टता निर्मित करता है
Due to total internal reflection of light rays, they do not reach the observer's eyes / प्रकाश किरणों का पूर्ण आंतरिक परावर्तन होने से वे प्रेक्षक की आँखों तक नहीं पहुँच पाती हैं
More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.answer: Most of the light is scattered, creating visual blur / अधिकतर प्रकाश बिखरकर आभासी अस्पष्टता निर्मित करता है
questions.explanation: The fine water droplets in fog act as scattering centers for visible light, preventing clear images from forming.

questions.question: Monochromatic light enters from one medium to another. Which of the following properties does not change? / एकवर्णी प्रकाश एक माध्यम से दूसरे माध्यम में प्रवेश करता है। निम्नलिखित में से कौन-सा गुण नहीं बदलता है?
options: More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: The frequency of light depends only on the source and remains constant when it travels from one medium to another.

questions.question: The speed of an electron in the ground state orbit of a hydrogen atom is / निम्नतम अवस्था में हाइड्रोजन परमाणु की कक्षा में एक इलेक्ट्रॉन की चाल होती है
options: More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: The speed of an electron in the first Bohr orbit is given by $v = c \alpha$, where $\alpha$ is the fine-structure constant $\approx 1/137$.

questions.question: A blackbody radiates energy at a rate of E watts per square meter at a high temperature TK. When the temperature is reduced to T/3K, the radiated energy (in watts per square meter) will be / एक कृष्णिका एक उच्च तापक्रम TK पर E वाट प्रति वर्ग मीटर की दर से ऊर्जा का विकिरण करती है। जब T/3K तापक्रम कर दिया जाए, तो विकिरित ऊर्जा (वाट प्रति वर्ग मीटर में) होगी
options: More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: According to Stefan-Boltzmann law, radiated energy $E \propto T^4$. If temperature is halved to $T/3$, the new energy becomes $E \times (1/3)^4 = E/81$.

questions.question: The acid that can decolorize acidic $KMnO_4$ is / अम्ल, जो अम्लीय $KMnO_4$ का रंग नष्ट कर सकता है, है
options: More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: Citric acid (C6H8O7) acts as a reducing agent and is easily oxidized by strong oxidizing agents like acidic KMnO4, decolorizing it.

questions.question: Who was the author of 'Banglar Mati, Banglar Jal', which was originally a protest song against the partition of Bengal by Lord Curzon in 1905, and for which the West Bengal Legislative Assembly has recently passed a resolution as the new state anthem? / 'बांग्लार माटी, बांग्लार जल' के लेखक कौन थे, जो मूल रूप से 1905 में लॉर्ड कर्जन द्वारा बंगाल के विभाजन के खिलाफ एक विरोध-गीत था, और जिसके लिए पश्चिम बंगाल विधान सभा ने हाल ही में नए राज्य गान के रूप में एक प्रस्ताव पारित किया है?
options: Kazi Nazrul Islam / काजी नजरूल इस्लाम
More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: Rabindranath Tagore wrote 'Banglar Mati, Banglar Jal' in 1905 to protest the Partition of Bengal.

questions.question: Who is the architect of India's newly inaugurated Parliament building? / हाल ही में उद्घाटित किए गए भारत के नए संसद भवन के वास्तुकार कौन हैं?
options: More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: Dr. Bimal Patel of HCP Design, Planning and Management is the chief architect of the new Parliament building.

questions.question: At the 76th Cannes Film Festival in May 2023, which of the following Indian films was screened? / 76वें कान्स फिल्म महोत्सव, मई 2023 में, निम्नलिखित में से कौन-सी भारतीय फिल्म प्रदर्शित की गई?
options: Anurag Kashyap's Kennedy / अनुराग कश्यप की केनेडी
Kanu Behl's Agra / कनु बहल की आगरा
Neeraj Pandey's Khakee / नीरज पांडे की खाकी
More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.answer: More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
questions.explanation: Both Anurag Kashyap's 'Kennedy' and Kanu Behl's 'Agra' were officially screened at the 2023 Cannes Film Festival.

questions.question: Azali Assoumani, who attended the G20 Summit in New Delhi as the current chairperson of the African Union, which became the newest member of the G20, is the President of which country of the African Union? / अज़ाली असौमानी, जिन्होंने अफ्रीकी संघ के वर्तमान अध्यक्ष के रूप में नई दिल्ली में G20 शिखर सम्मेलन में भाग लिया, जो G20 का सबसे नया सदस्य बन गया है, वे अफ्रीकी संघ के किस देश के राष्ट्रपति हैं?
options: Republic of the Congo / कांगो गणराज्य
More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: Azali Assoumani is the President of the Comoros and served as the Chairperson of the African Union.

questions.question: When is 'Human Rights Day' celebrated every year? / 'मानव अधिकार दिवस' प्रतिवर्ष कब मनाया जाता है?
options: More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: Human Rights Day is observed by the international community every year on 10 December.

questions.question: Who was the founder of the 'Indian National Army (INA)'? / 'भारतीय राष्ट्रीय सेना (आइ० एन० ए०)' के संस्थापक कौन थे?
options: Subhas Chandra Bose / सुभाष चन्द्र बोस
Lala Lajpat Rai / लाला लाजपत राय
More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: Captain Mohan Singh originally founded the first Indian National Army (INA) in 1942.

questions.question: The 'Tana Bhagat Movement' is related to / 'ताना भगत आन्दोलन' सम्बन्धित है
options: More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: While traditionally recognized as a tribal movement (Oraon tribe), the official BPSC answer key assigns this to option A (Dalit movement).

questions.question: In which state is 'Rakshabandhan' celebrated as 'Vriksh Suraksha Diwas' (Tree Protection Day)? / किस राज्य में, 'रक्षाबन्धन' को 'वृक्ष सुरक्षा दिवस' के रूप में मनाया जाता है?
options: More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: Bihar introduced the initiative of celebrating Rakshabandhan as Vriksh Suraksha Diwas to promote environmental conservation.

questions.question: In which of the following states is black soil found? / निम्नलिखित में से किस राज्य में काली मिट्टी पाई जाती है?
options: More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.answer: More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
questions.explanation: Black soil is predominantly found in the Deccan trap region, which includes both Gujarat and Karnataka.

questions.question: How many species of flora and fauna are found in India? / भारतवर्ष में वनस्पति एवं जीवों की कितनी प्रजाति पाई जाती हैं?
options: 81000 species of fauna and 47000 species of flora / 81000 प्रजाति जीवों की एवं 47000 प्रजाति वनस्पति की
70000 species of fauna and 50000 species of flora / 70000 प्रजाति जीवों की एवं 50000 प्रजाति वनस्पति की
50000 species of fauna and 40000 species of flora / 50000 प्रजाति जीवों की एवं 40000 प्रजाति वनस्पति की
More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.answer: 81000 species of fauna and 47000 species of flora / 81000 प्रजाति जीवों की एवं 47000 प्रजाति वनस्पति की
questions.explanation: According to the Botanical and Zoological Surveys, India harbors approximately 47,000 plant species and 81,000 animal species.

questions.question: Minerals are deposited and accumulated in the stratums of which of the following rocks? / खनिज निम्नलिखित में से किस चट्टान के स्तर में जमा होता है?
options: More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: In sedimentary rocks, minerals like coal and some forms of iron ore are deposited and concentrated in horizontal layers/strata.

questions.question: Which of the following is a leguminous crop? / निम्नलिखित में से कौन-सी एक फलीदार फसल है?
options: More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: Pulses belong to the legume family, characterized by seeds in pods.

questions.question: Which of the following two extreme locations are connected by the East-West corridor? / निम्नलिखित में से कौन-से दो चरम स्थान पूर्व-पश्चिमी गलियारे से जुड़े हैं?
options: Mumbai and Nagpur / मुम्बई और नागपुर
Mumbai and Kolkata / मुम्बई और कोलकाता
Silchar and Porbandar / सिल्चर और पोरबन्दर
More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.answer: Silchar and Porbandar / सिल्चर और पोरबन्दर
questions.explanation: The East-West corridor connects Silchar in Assam to Porbandar in Gujarat.

questions.question: Stalactite and stalagmite features are formed by / स्टैलेक्टाइट एवं स्टैलेग्माइट स्थलाकृतियाँ बनती हैं
options: More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: Stalactites and stalagmites are depositional landforms created in limestone caves by the action of mineral-rich underground water.

questions.question: April 22 is celebrated as / 22 अप्रैल को किस रूप में मनाते हैं?
options: World Earth Day / विश्व पृथ्वी दिवस
World Health Day / विश्व स्वास्थ्य दिवस
World Ozone Day / विश्व ओज़ोन दिवस
More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.answer: World Earth Day / विश्व पृथ्वी दिवस
questions.explanation: April 22 is recognized globally as Earth Day to support environmental protection.

questions.question: The topographic map of India is produced by which organization? / भारत का स्थलाकृतिक मानचित्र किस संगठन द्वारा बनाया जाता है?
options: Geological Survey of India / भारतीय भूवैज्ञानिक सर्वेक्षण
Zoological Survey of India / भारतीय प्राणि सर्वेक्षण
More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: The Survey of India (SOI) is the national survey and mapping organization entrusted with topographic mapping.

questions.question: The Revolt of 1857 was first described as the 'First Indian War of Independence' by / 1857 के विद्रोह को किसके द्वारा पहली बार 'प्रथम भारतीय स्वतंत्रता संग्राम' के रूप में वर्णित किया गया था?
options: V. D. Savarkar / वी० डी० सावरकर
Bal Gangadhar Tilak / बाल गंगाधर तिलक
R. C. Majumdar / आर० सी० मजूमदार
More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.answer: V. D. Savarkar / वी० डी० सावरकर
questions.explanation: V. D. Savarkar authored the book 'The Indian War of Independence 1857', prominently framing it as a national struggle.

questions.question: Which of the following events happened first? / निम्नलिखित में से कौन-सी घटना सबसे पहले हुई?
options: Birsa Munda's Rebellion / बिरसा मुंडा का विद्रोह
Tana Bhagat Movement / ताना भगत आन्दोलन
More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: The Santhal Rebellion occurred in 1855-56, preceding the Birsa Munda Rebellion (1899-1900) and Tana Bhagat Movement (1914).

questions.question: Which rebellion is mentioned in Bankim Chandra Chatterjee's novel Anandamath? / बंकिम चन्द्र चटर्जी का उपन्यास, आनन्दमठ में किस विद्रोह का उल्लेख है?
options: More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: Anandamath is heavily based on and popularizes the Sanyasi Rebellion.

questions.question: When were 'Swadeshi' and 'Boycott' adopted as methods of struggle for the first time in India? / प्रथम बार संघर्ष के तरीकों के रूप में 'स्वदेशी' एवं 'बहिष्कार' भारत में कब अपनाया गया?
options: Home Rule Movement / होम रूल आन्दोलन
More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: Swadeshi and Boycott became prominent tools of mass struggle during the anti-partition movement of Bengal in 1905.

questions.question: Who was the President of the Gaya session of the Indian National Congress held in 1922? / 1922 में, आयोजित भारतीय राष्ट्रीय काँग्रेस के गया अधिवेशन के अध्यक्ष कौन थे?
options: Hakim Ajmal Khan / हकीम अजमल ख़ाँ
More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: C. R. Das presided over the Gaya session of the INC in 1922.

questions.question: Who led the peasants in Bihar during the Non-Cooperation Movement? / असहयोग आन्दोलन के दौरान किसने बिहार में किसानों की अगुवाई की?
options: More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: Swami Vidyanand led peasant movements in North Bihar, specifically Darbhanga, during the Non-Cooperation movement.

questions.question: Who founded the Hindu College in Calcutta in 1817? / 1817 में, कलकत्ता में हिन्दू कॉलेज की स्थापना किसने की?
options: Henry Vivian Derozio / हेनरी विवियन डेरोजियो
More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: David Hare, alongside Raja Ram Mohan Roy and others, played a pivotal role in establishing the Hindu College in 1817.

questions.question: Who among the following said, "The Congress is tottering to its fall, and one of my greatest ambitions while in India is to assist it to a peaceful demise"? / इनमें से किसने कहा था कि "काँग्रेस का महल लड़खड़ा रहा है और भारत में रहते हुए मेरी एक बड़ी महत्त्वाकांक्षा यह है कि मैं शान्ति के साथ इसे मरने में सहयोग दे सकूँ"?
options: More than one of the above / उपर्युक्त में से एक से अधिक
None of the above / उपर्युक्त में से कोई नहीं
questions.explanation: This famous remark was made by Lord Curzon in 1900 in a letter to the Secretary of State.

questions.question: The brain of any computer system is
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: The Central Processing Unit (CPU) executes instructions and is universally referred to as the brain of the computer.

questions.question: When a key is pressed on keyboard, which standard is used for converting the keystroke into the corresponding bits?
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: According to the official BPSC answer key, ANSI is designated as the correct answer.

questions.question: What difference do the fifth generation computers have from other generation computers?
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: Fifth-generation computers are distinct primarily due to major technological advancements, specifically in Artificial Intelligence and parallel processing.

questions.question: Source code is available to view, modify and redistribute in
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: Open-source software provides users the rights to view, modify, and distribute its source code.

questions.question: Machine language is
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: According to the official BPSC answer key, Option A (machine dependent) is accepted, although B and C are also factual characteristics.

questions.question: An assembly language is a/an
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: Assembly language is a low-level programming language that has a strong correspondence to the architecture's machine code instructions.

questions.question: A compiler is a translating program which
options: translates instruction of a high-level language into machine language
translates entire source program into machine language program
It is not involved in program's execution
More than one of the above
questions.answer: It is not involved in program's execution
questions.explanation: According to the official BPSC answer key, Option C is designated as the correct choice.

questions.question: Which of the following approaches is used by C++?
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: According to the official BPSC answer key, Option A (Left-right) is designated as the correct choice.

questions.question: What is virtual inheritance in C++?
options: C++ technique to enhance multiple inheritance
C++ technique to ensure that a private member of the base class can be accessed somehow
C++ technique to avoid multiple copies of the base class into children/derived class
More than one of the above
questions.answer: C++ technique to avoid multiple copies of the base class into children/derived class
questions.explanation: Virtual inheritance solves the 'diamond problem' by ensuring only one instance of a base class is inherited by derived classes.

options: The program is not semantically correct
The program is compiled and executed successfully
The program is compiled successfully but throws an error during runtime
More than one of the above
questions.answer: The program is not semantically correct
questions.explanation: The syntax 'deleteptr' without a space causes an error as it's interpreted as an undeclared identifier.

questions.question: What is the difference between delete and delete[] in C++?
options: Delete is syntactically correct but delete[] is wrong and hence will give an error if used in any case
Delete is used to delete normal objects whereas delete[] is used to delete pointer objects
Delete is used to delete single object whereas delete[] is used to delete multiple (array/pointer) of objects
More than one of the above
questions.answer: Delete is used to delete single object whereas delete[] is used to delete multiple (array/pointer) of objects
questions.explanation: 'delete' is for memory allocated with 'new', while 'delete[]' is for an array of objects allocated with 'new[]'.

options: Error in C and successful execution in C++
Error in both C and C++
Error in C++ and successful execution in C
More than one of the above
questions.answer: Error in C++ and successful execution in C
questions.explanation: 'new' is a reserved keyword in C++ but perfectly valid as a variable identifier in C.

options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: (x|y) evaluates bitwise OR: 10 | 5 = 1010 | 0101 = 1111 (15 in decimal). (a+b) converts booleans to ints: 1+0=1. p = 15 + 1 = 16.

questions.question: The C++ code which causes abnormal termination / behaviour of a program should be written under ___ block.
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: Code that can potentially throw exceptions (causing abnormal behavior if unhandled) should be encapsulated in a 'try' block.

options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: According to the official BPSC answer key, Option C (Segmentation fault) is considered the correct answer (despite the actual standard C++ behavior being undefined due to sequence points).

questions.question: Pick the incorrect statement about inline functions in C++.
options: They save overhead of a return call from a function.
They are generally very large and complicated function.
These functions are inserted/substituted at the point of call.
More than one of the above
questions.answer: These functions are inserted/substituted at the point of call.
questions.explanation: According to the official BPSC answer key, Option C is designated as the correct response.

questions.question: What is abstract class in C++?
options: Any class in C++ is an abstract class/Class from which any class is derived
Class specifically used as a base class with at least one virtual function
Class specifically used as a base class with at least one pure virtual function
More than one of the above
questions.answer: Class specifically used as a base class with at least one pure virtual function
questions.explanation: An abstract class in C++ is defined as a class containing at least one pure virtual function.

questions.question: Which of the following constructors is provided by the C++ compiler if not defined in a class?
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: If no constructor is defined in a class, the compiler automatically generates a default constructor.

questions.question: How do structures and classes in C++ differ?
options: In structures, members are private by default whereas in classes, they are public by default
In structures, members are public by default whereas in classes, they are private by default
Structures cannot have private members whereas classes can have
More than one of the above
questions.answer: In structures, members are public by default whereas in classes, they are private by default
questions.explanation: The primary semantic difference in C++ is that struct members are public by default, while class members are private by default.

questions.question: Which of the following features must be supported by any programming language to become a pure object-oriented programming language?
options: More than one of the above
questions.answer: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: A pure OOP language must support all main OOP pillars: encapsulation, inheritance, and polymorphism.

questions.question: The programming language that has the ability to create new data types is called
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: Extensible programming languages allow users to define new data types, syntax, or semantics.

questions.question: Which of the following is the original creator of the C++ language?
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: Bjarne Stroustrup created C++ as an extension of the C language at Bell Labs.

questions.question: Which of the following is the correct syntax to read the single character to console in the C++ language?
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: cin.get(ch) is used in C++ to extract a single character from the input stream.

questions.question: Which of the following gives the nth element of the Array?
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: Since arrays in C++ are 0-indexed, the nth element is accessed using array[n-1].

questions.question: How many types of the array are there in the C++ programming language?
options: There are three types of arrays
There are four types of arrays
There are two types of arrays
More than one of the above
questions.answer: There are two types of arrays
questions.explanation: Generally, arrays are categorized into single-dimensional and multi-dimensional arrays.

questions.question: In C++, for what purpose the "rank()" is used?
options: It returns the size of each dimension
It returns the maximum number of elements that can be stored in the array
It returns the dimension of the specified array
More than one of the above
questions.answer: It returns the dimension of the specified array
questions.explanation: std::rank in C++ type traits returns the number of dimensions (rank) of an array type.

questions.question: What is the scope of the variable declared in the user-defined function?
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: According to the official BPSC answer key, Option C is designated as the correct choice.

questions.question: Which one of the following is the correct definition of the "is_array();" function in C++?
options: It checks that the specified variable is of the array or not
It checks that the specified array is of single dimension or not
It checks that the array specified is of multi-dimension or not
More than one of the above
questions.answer: It checks that the specified variable is of the array or not
questions.explanation: std::is_array is a type trait in C++ that checks whether a given type is an array.

questions.question:
Which of the following statements is true about the new and malloc?
I. The 'new' is a type of operator while 'malloc' is a kind of function.
II. The 'new' invokes a constructor, whereas 'malloc' does not invoke the constructor.
III. The 'malloc' returns void pointer and also needed to typecast whereas 'new' returns required pointer.
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: According to the official BPSC answer key, Option A is accepted as the correct response.

questions.question: Which of the following can be considered as the members that can be inherited but not accessible in any class?
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: Private members of a base class are inherited by the derived class but cannot be directly accessed by it.

questions.question:
Which of the following statements is completely true?
I. In an object-oriented programming language, all the function calls are resolved at compile-time.
II. In a procedure programming language, all the function calls are resolved at compile-time.
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: OOP uses dynamic binding (runtime resolution) for virtual functions, making I false. Procedural languages statically resolve calls at compile-time.

questions.question: What will happen if in a C++ program, a class has no name?
options: It is not even allowed in C++
It will not have the constructor
It will not have the destructor
More than one of the above
questions.answer: It will not have the destructor
questions.explanation: Anonymous classes in C++ cannot have a destructor, as a destructor must share the exact name of the class.

questions.question: How can one implement the compile-time polymorphism in the C++ programming language?
options: By using the concepts of inheritance
By using both the virtual functions and inheritance
More than one of the above
questions.explanation: Compile-time polymorphism is achieved using function overloading, operator overloading, and templates.

questions.question: Which of the following refers to the wrapping of data and its functionality into a single individual entity?
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: Encapsulation is the object-oriented principle of bundling data and methods that operate on that data within one unit (e.g., a class).

questions.question: Among the following, which statement is correct about the modularity?
options: Modularity means hiding the parts of the program.
Modularity refers to dividing a program into subsequent small or independent parts.
It refers to overloading the program's part.
More than one of the above
questions.answer: Modularity refers to dividing a program into subsequent small or independent parts.
questions.explanation: Modularity entails breaking down a large system into smaller, manageable, and independent modules.

questions.question: Which one of the following is not the application of the stack data structure?
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: Asynchronous data transfer commonly uses queues/buffers (like FIFO), not stacks.

questions.question: Which of the following is the prefix form of A+B*C?
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: The order of precedence places multiplication first (*BC), then addition (+A(*BC)) resulting in +A*BC.

questions.question: Which data structure is required to convert the infix to prefix notation?
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: Stacks are extensively used in parsing and converting arithmetic expressions (like infix to postfix/prefix).

questions.question: Which of the following highly uses the concept of an array?
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: Arrays use contiguous memory, inherently maximizing spatial locality which improves CPU cache performance.

questions.question: The necessary condition to be checked before deletion from the queue is
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: Before deleting from a queue, one must check for underflow to ensure the queue is not already empty.

questions.question: Which one of the following is not the application of the queue data structure?
options: Resource is shared between various systems
More than one of the above
questions.explanation: Balancing of symbols (like parentheses matching) is a classic application of a stack, not a queue.

questions.question: Which one of the following techniques is not used in the binary tree?
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: Preorder, Inorder, and Postorder are all standard depth-first traversal techniques for binary trees.

questions.question: How can we describe an array in the best possible way?
options: Container that stores the elements of similar types
The array is not a data structure
More than one of the above
questions.answer: Container that stores the elements of similar types
questions.explanation: An array is a linear data structure acting as a container to store homogenous elements.

questions.question: What is another name for the circular queue among the following options?
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: A circular queue is also called a ring buffer because its ends are logically connected.

questions.question: Which of the following determines the need for the circular queue?
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: A regular linear queue wastes space once elements are dequeued because the rear pointer reaches the end; circular queues fix this by looping around.

questions.question: Which data structure is the best for implementing a priority queue?
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: A binary heap provides efficient O(log N) times for insertion and extraction, making it the standard underlying structure for priority queues.

questions.question: Which of the following data structures finds its use in recursion?
options: More than one of the above
questions.answer: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: According to the official BPSC answer key, Option D is designated as the correct choice.

questions.question: Which of the following satisfies the property of the red-black tree?
options: Black, if the new node is a root node
Red, if the new node is not a root node
Black, if the new node is not a root node
More than one of the above
questions.answer: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: According to the official BPSC answer key, Option D is designated as the correct choice.

questions.question: In the deque implementation, using singly linked list, what would be the time complexity of deleting an element from the rear end?
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: In a singly linked list, to delete the rear element, you must traverse O(N) nodes to find the new tail.

questions.question: Which one of the following is the overflow condition if linear queue is implemented using an array with a size MAX_SIZE?
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: Since array indexing typically starts at 0, the last valid index is MAX_SIZE-1. If rear matches this, the linear queue is full.

questions.question: Which of the following is a divide-and-conquer algorithm?
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: Merge sort splits arrays in half (divide) and merges them sorted (conquer).

questions.question: What is a database?
options: Organized collection of information that cannot be accessed, updated and managed
Organized collection of data or information that can be accessed, updated and managed
Organized collection of data that cannot be updated
More than one of the above
questions.answer: Organized collection of data that cannot be updated
questions.explanation: According to the official BPSC answer key, Option C is designated as the correct choice.

questions.question: Which type of data can be stored in the database?
options: Data in the form of audio or video
More than one of the above
questions.answer: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: Databases can store text, images, audio, and video files (often using BLOBs).

questions.question: Which of the following is not a type of database?
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: Decentralized is not typically defined as a standard conventional database management system architectural type like Network or Distributed.

questions.question: Which of the following is not an example of DBMS?
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: Google is a search engine and tech company, whereas MS Access and IBM Db2 are actual Database Management Systems.

questions.question: Which of the following is not a feature of DBMS?
options: Minimum duplication and redundancy of data
More than one of the above
questions.explanation: A major feature of DBMS is allowing concurrent access to data by multiple users.

questions.question: Which of the following is not a function of the database?
options: More than one of the above
questions.answer: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: According to the official BPSC answer key, Option D is designated as the correct choice.

questions.question: What is information about data called?
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: Metadata is defined as data about data.

questions.question: The DBMS acts as an interface between ___ and ___ of an enterprise-class system.
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: A DBMS sits between the end-user applications and the actual database content.

questions.question: ___ is a set of one or more attribute(s) taken collectively to uniquely identify a record.
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: A superkey is any set of attributes that uniquely identifies tuples in a relation.

questions.question: Which of the following commands is correct to delete the values in the relation teaches?
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: The 'DELETE FROM table_name;' statement removes all rows/values from the table.

questions.question: The top level of the hierarchy consists of ___ each of which can contain ___.
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: In SQL standard hierarchy, a catalog contains schemas, and schemas contain tables/views.

questions.question: The user IDs can be added or removed using which of the following fixed roles?
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: In SQL Server, the db_accessadmin fixed database role manages access/login credentials.

questions.question: The traditional storage of data organized by the customer, stored in separate folders in filing cabinets is an example of
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: A hierarchical system operates like a tree/folder structure mirroring physical filing cabinets.

questions.question: After groups have been established, SQL applies predicates in the ___ clause, allowing aggregate functions to be used.
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: According to the official BPSC answer key, Option C (WITH) is designated as the correct choice.

questions.question:
Which of the follownig is not the utility of DBMS?
I. Backup
II. Loading
III. Process organization
IV. File organization
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: Process organization is an OS feature, not a DBMS utility. Thus, Backup, Loading, and File organization (I, II, IV) are DBMS utilities.

questions.question: For designing a normal RDBMS, which of the following normal forms is considered adequate?
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: According to the official BPSC answer key, Option C (2NF) is designated as the correct choice.

questions.question: What happens if a piece of data is stored in two places in the db?
options: Storage space is wasted and changing the data in one spot will cause data inconsistency
Changing the data in one spot will cause data inconsistency
More than one of the above
questions.answer: Storage space is wasted and changing the data in one spot will cause data inconsistency
questions.explanation: Data redundancy wastes storage and highly risks anomalies resulting in data inconsistency.

questions.question: Which data type can store unstructured data in a column?
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: RAW (or BLOB) data types are used to store unstructured binary data.

questions.question: The logic gate that provides high output for same input is
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: According to the official BPSC answer key, Option E (None of the above) is designated as the correct choice.

questions.question: Boolean algebra can be used
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: Boolean algebra provides the fundamental mathematical framework for designing digital logic circuits in computers.

questions.question: Communication between a computer and a keyboard involves ___ transmission.
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: Data only flows in one direction, from the keyboard to the computer.

questions.question: The simplified form of the Boolean expression $(X+Y+XY)(X+Z)$ is
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: According to the official BPSC answer key, Option C ($XZ+Y$) is designated as the correct choice.

questions.question: The dual of a Boolean expression is obtained by
options: interchanging all Os and 1s, all '+' and '.' signs
interchanging all Os and 1s, all '+' and '.' signs and complementing all the variables
More than one of the above
questions.explanation: According to the official BPSC answer key, Option A is designated as the correct choice.

questions.question: Wireless transmission of signals can be done via
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: According to the official BPSC answer key, Option B (microwaves) is designated as the correct choice.

questions.question: Sniffers can be prevented by using
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: Switches only forward packets to the intended port, heavily mitigating simple packet sniffing that is common on hubs.

questions.question: In TDM, slots are further divided into
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: In Time Division Multiplexing (TDM), time slots are organized into larger constructs called frames.

questions.question: Transmission control protocol
options: uses a three-way handshake to establish a connection
receives data from application as a single stream
More than one of the above
questions.answer: uses a three-way handshake to establish a connection
questions.explanation: While TCP fits all three descriptions, the BPSC key designates Option B as the correct answer.

questions.question: An endpoint of an inter-process communication flow across a computer network is called
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: A socket acts as an endpoint for sending or receiving data across a computer network.

questions.question: Which transmission media provides the highest transmission speed in a network?
options: More than one of the above
questions.explanation: Optical fiber cables transmit data as pulses of light, offering significantly higher bandwidth and speed than copper cables.
